full_text:
Gongsun Yuan (Wenyi) 公孫淵 (文懿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Yuan (公孫淵), styledWenyi (文懿), was born in Xiangping county, Liaodong commandery. Declared himself King of Yan but was executed by Sima Yi. Gongsun Yuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Gongsun Yuan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
